SET statement_timeout = 0;
SET lock_timeout = 0;
SET idle_in_transaction_session_timeout = 0;
SET client_encoding = 'UTF8';
SET standard_conforming_strings = on;
SELECT pg_catalog.set_config('search_path', '', false);
SET check_function_bodies = false;
SET xmloption = content;
SET client_min_messages = warning;
SET row_security = off;

--
-- Name: pgcrypto; Type: EXTENSION; Schema: -; Owner: -
--

CREATE EXTENSION IF NOT EXISTS pgcrypto WITH SCHEMA public;


--
-- Name: EXTENSION pgcrypto; Type: COMMENT; Schema: -; Owner: -
--

COMMENT ON EXTENSION pgcrypto IS 'cryptographic functions';


SET default_tablespace = '';

SET default_table_access_method = heap;

--
-- Name: activity_logs; Type: TABLE; Schema: public; Owner: -
--

CREATE TABLE public.activity_logs (
    id uuid DEFAULT gen_random_uuid() NOT NULL,
    user_id uuid,
    action character varying(50) NOT NULL,
    title text,
    meta text,
    created_at timestamp with time zone DEFAULT now()
);


--
-- Name: btc_prices; Type: TABLE; Schema: public; Owner: -
--

CREATE TABLE public.btc_prices (
    id integer NOT NULL,
    price_usd numeric(18,2),
    price_zmw numeric(18,2),
    fetched_at timestamp with time zone DEFAULT now()
);


--
-- Name: btc_prices_id_seq; Type: SEQUENCE; Schema: public; Owner: -
--

CREATE SEQUENCE public.btc_prices_id_seq
    AS integer
    START WITH 1
    INCREMENT BY 1
    NO MINVALUE
    NO MAXVALUE
    CACHE 1;


--
-- Name: btc_prices_id_seq; Type: SEQUENCE OWNED BY; Schema: public; Owner: -
--

ALTER SEQUENCE public.btc_prices_id_seq OWNED BY public.btc_prices.id;


--
-- Name: notifications; Type: TABLE; Schema: public; Owner: -
--

CREATE TABLE public.notifications (
    id uuid DEFAULT gen_random_uuid() NOT NULL,
    user_id uuid NOT NULL,
    kind character varying(30) NOT NULL,
    title text NOT NULL,
    body text,
    unread boolean DEFAULT true,
    created_at timestamp with time zone DEFAULT now()
);


--
-- Name: otp_codes; Type: TABLE; Schema: public; Owner: -
--

CREATE TABLE public.otp_codes (
    id uuid DEFAULT gen_random_uuid() NOT NULL,
    code character varying(6) NOT NULL,
    expires_at timestamp with time zone NOT NULL,
    used boolean DEFAULT false,
    created_at timestamp with time zone DEFAULT now(),
    email character varying(255)
);


--
-- Name: price_protection; Type: TABLE; Schema: public; Owner: -
--

CREATE TABLE public.price_protection (
    id uuid DEFAULT gen_random_uuid() NOT NULL,
    user_id uuid NOT NULL,
    enabled boolean DEFAULT false,
    threshold_pct integer DEFAULT 20,
    asset_state character varying(20) DEFAULT 'btc'::character varying,
    created_at timestamp with time zone DEFAULT now(),
    updated_at timestamp with time zone DEFAULT now()
);


--
-- Name: profiles; Type: TABLE; Schema: public; Owner: -
--

CREATE TABLE public.profiles (
    id uuid DEFAULT gen_random_uuid() NOT NULL,
    user_id uuid NOT NULL,
    display_name character varying(100),
    avatar_initials character varying(5),
    avatar_color character varying(20) DEFAULT 'btc'::character varying,
    profile_picture_url text,
    biometric_enabled boolean DEFAULT false,
    notification_preferences jsonb DEFAULT '{}'::jsonb,
    created_at timestamp with time zone DEFAULT now(),
    updated_at timestamp with time zone DEFAULT now(),
    transaction_pin_hash text,
    transaction_pin_enabled boolean DEFAULT false NOT NULL,
    transaction_pin_created_at timestamp with time zone,
    transaction_pin_updated_at timestamp with time zone,
    failed_pin_attempts integer DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
    transaction_lock_until timestamp with time zone
);


--
-- Name: sessions; Type: TABLE; Schema: public; Owner: -
--

CREATE TABLE public.sessions (
    id uuid DEFAULT gen_random_uuid() NOT NULL,
    user_id uuid NOT NULL,
    refresh_token text NOT NULL,
    expires_at timestamp with time zone NOT NULL,
    created_at timestamp with time zone DEFAULT now()
);


--
-- Name: transactions; Type: TABLE; Schema: public; Owner: -
--

CREATE TABLE public.transactions (
    id uuid DEFAULT gen_random_uuid() NOT NULL,
    user_id uuid NOT NULL,
    vault_id uuid,
    type character varying(30) NOT NULL,
    amount_sats bigint DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
    status character varying(20) DEFAULT 'pending'::character varying,
    method character varying(30),
    metadata jsonb DEFAULT '{}'::jsonb,
    external_id text,
    created_at timestamp with time zone DEFAULT now(),
    updated_at timestamp with time zone DEFAULT now(),
    lightning_invoice text,
    lightning_payment_hash text
);


--
-- Name: treasury_state; Type: TABLE; Schema: public; Owner: -
--

CREATE TABLE public.treasury_state (
    id integer NOT NULL,
    current_mode text DEFAULT 'btc'::text NOT NULL,
    reference_price_usd numeric NOT NULL,
    protection_price_usd numeric NOT NULL,
    pending_action text,
    pending_started_at timestamp with time zone,
    last_transition_at timestamp with time zone,
    last_transition_price numeric,
    btc_wallet_id text,
    usd_wallet_id text,
    created_at timestamp with time zone DEFAULT now(),
    updated_at timestamp with time zone DEFAULT now()
);


--
-- Name: treasury_state_id_seq; Type: SEQUENCE; Schema: public; Owner: -
--

CREATE SEQUENCE public.treasury_state_id_seq
    AS integer
    START WITH 1
    INCREMENT BY 1
    NO MINVALUE
    NO MAXVALUE
    CACHE 1;


--
-- Name: treasury_state_id_seq; Type: SEQUENCE OWNED BY; Schema: public; Owner: -
--

ALTER SEQUENCE public.treasury_state_id_seq OWNED BY public.treasury_state.id;


--
-- Name: treasury_transitions; Type: TABLE; Schema: public; Owner: -
--

CREATE TABLE public.treasury_transitions (
    id integer NOT NULL,
    from_mode text NOT NULL,
    to_mode text NOT NULL,
    trigger_price numeric NOT NULL,
    reference_price numeric NOT NULL,
    blink_tx_id text,
    created_at timestamp with time zone DEFAULT now()
);


--
-- Name: treasury_transitions_id_seq; Type: SEQUENCE; Schema: public; Owner: -
--

CREATE SEQUENCE public.treasury_transitions_id_seq
    AS integer
    START WITH 1
    INCREMENT BY 1
    NO MINVALUE
    NO MAXVALUE
    CACHE 1;


--
-- Name: treasury_transitions_id_seq; Type: SEQUENCE OWNED BY; Schema: public; Owner: -
--

ALTER SEQUENCE public.treasury_transitions_id_seq OWNED BY public.treasury_transitions.id;


--
-- Name: users; Type: TABLE; Schema: public; Owner: -
--

CREATE TABLE public.users (
    id uuid DEFAULT gen_random_uuid() NOT NULL,
    username character varying(50) NOT NULL,
    email character varying(255),
    account_status character varying(20) DEFAULT 'active'::character varying,
    created_at timestamp with time zone DEFAULT now(),
    updated_at timestamp with time zone DEFAULT now()
);


--
-- Name: vaults; Type: TABLE; Schema: public; Owner: -
--

CREATE TABLE public.vaults (
    id uuid DEFAULT gen_random_uuid() NOT NULL,
    user_id uuid NOT NULL,
    name character varying(50) NOT NULL,
    vault_type character varying(10) NOT NULL,
    emoji character varying(10) DEFAULT '💰'::character varying,
    accent character varying(10) DEFAULT 'btc'::character varying,
    goal_sats bigint DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
    current_sats bigint DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
    goal_fiat numeric(18,2) DEFAULT 0,
    currency character varying(10) DEFAULT 'ZMW'::character varying,
    locked_until timestamp with time zone,
    withdrawal_penalty_pct integer DEFAULT 0,
    status character varying(20) DEFAULT 'active'::character varying,
    streak_days integer DEFAULT 0,
    last_deposit_at timestamp with time zone,
    created_at timestamp with time zone DEFAULT now(),
    updated_at timestamp with time zone DEFAULT now(),
    CONSTRAINT vaults_vault_type_check CHECK (((vault_type)::text = ANY ((ARRAY['stack'::character varying, 'hodl'::character varying])::text[])))
);


--
-- Name: wallets; Type: TABLE; Schema: public; Owner: -
--

CREATE TABLE public.wallets (
    id uuid DEFAULT gen_random_uuid() NOT NULL,
    user_id uuid NOT NULL,
    available_sats bigint DEFAULT 0,
    vault_sats bigint DEFAULT 0,
    created_at timestamp with time zone DEFAULT now(),
    updated_at timestamp with time zone DEFAULT now()
);


--
-- Name: btc_prices id; Type: DEFAULT; Schema: public; Owner: -
--

ALTER TABLE ONLY public.btc_prices ALTER COLUMN id SET DEFAULT nextval('public.btc_prices_id_seq'::regclass);


--
-- Name: treasury_state id; Type: DEFAULT; Schema: public; Owner: -
--

ALTER TABLE ONLY public.treasury_state ALTER COLUMN id SET DEFAULT nextval('public.treasury_state_id_seq'::regclass);


--
-- Name: treasury_transitions id; Type: DEFAULT; Schema: public; Owner: -
--

ALTER TABLE ONLY public.treasury_transitions ALTER COLUMN id SET DEFAULT nextval('public.treasury_transitions_id_seq'::regclass);

--
-- Name: activity_logs activity_logs_pkey; Type: CONSTRAINT; Schema: public; Owner: -
--

ALTER TABLE ONLY public.activity_logs
    ADD CONSTRAINT activity_logs_pkey PRIMARY KEY (id);


--
-- Name: btc_prices btc_prices_pkey; Type: CONSTRAINT; Schema: public; Owner: -
--

ALTER TABLE ONLY public.btc_prices
    ADD CONSTRAINT btc_prices_pkey PRIMARY KEY (id);


--
-- Name: notifications notifications_pkey; Type: CONSTRAINT; Schema: public; Owner: -
--

ALTER TABLE ONLY public.notifications
    ADD CONSTRAINT notifications_pkey PRIMARY KEY (id);


--
-- Name: otp_codes otp_codes_pkey; Type: CONSTRAINT; Schema: public; Owner: -
--

ALTER TABLE ONLY public.otp_codes
    ADD CONSTRAINT otp_codes_pkey PRIMARY KEY (id);


--
-- Name: price_protection price_protection_pkey; Type: CONSTRAINT; Schema: public; Owner: -
--

ALTER TABLE ONLY public.price_protection
    ADD CONSTRAINT price_protection_pkey PRIMARY KEY (id);


--
-- Name: price_protection price_protection_user_id_key; Type: CONSTRAINT; Schema: public; Owner: -
--

ALTER TABLE ONLY public.price_protection
    ADD CONSTRAINT price_protection_user_id_key UNIQUE (user_id);


--
-- Name: profiles profiles_pkey; Type: CONSTRAINT; Schema: public; Owner: -
--

ALTER TABLE ONLY public.profiles
    ADD CONSTRAINT profiles_pkey PRIMARY KEY (id);


--
-- Name: profiles profiles_user_id_key; Type: CONSTRAINT; Schema: public; Owner: -
--

ALTER TABLE ONLY public.profiles
    ADD CONSTRAINT profiles_user_id_key UNIQUE (user_id);


--
-- Name: sessions sessions_pkey; Type: CONSTRAINT; Schema: public; Owner: -
--

ALTER TABLE ONLY public.sessions
    ADD CONSTRAINT sessions_pkey PRIMARY KEY (id);


--
-- Name: sessions sessions_refresh_token_key; Type: CONSTRAINT; Schema: public; Owner: -
--

ALTER TABLE ONLY public.sessions
    ADD CONSTRAINT sessions_refresh_token_key UNIQUE (refresh_token);


--
-- Name: transactions transactions_pkey; Type: CONSTRAINT; Schema: public; Owner: -
--

ALTER TABLE ONLY public.transactions
    ADD CONSTRAINT transactions_pkey PRIMARY KEY (id);


--
-- Name: treasury_state treasury_state_pkey; Type: CONSTRAINT; Schema: public; Owner: -
--

ALTER TABLE ONLY public.treasury_state
    ADD CONSTRAINT treasury_state_pkey PRIMARY KEY (id);


--
-- Name: treasury_transitions treasury_transitions_pkey; Type: CONSTRAINT; Schema: public; Owner: -
--

ALTER TABLE ONLY public.treasury_transitions
    ADD CONSTRAINT treasury_transitions_pkey PRIMARY KEY (id);


--
-- Name: users users_pkey; Type: CONSTRAINT; Schema: public; Owner: -
--

ALTER TABLE ONLY public.users
    ADD CONSTRAINT users_pkey PRIMARY KEY (id);


--
-- Name: users users_username_key; Type: CONSTRAINT; Schema: public; Owner: -
--

ALTER TABLE ONLY public.users
    ADD CONSTRAINT users_username_key UNIQUE (username);


--
-- Name: vaults vaults_pkey; Type: CONSTRAINT; Schema: public; Owner: -
--

ALTER TABLE ONLY public.vaults
    ADD CONSTRAINT vaults_pkey PRIMARY KEY (id);


--
-- Name: wallets wallets_pkey; Type: CONSTRAINT; Schema: public; Owner: -
--

ALTER TABLE ONLY public.wallets
    ADD CONSTRAINT wallets_pkey PRIMARY KEY (id);


--
-- Name: wallets wallets_user_id_key; Type: CONSTRAINT; Schema: public; Owner: -
--

ALTER TABLE ONLY public.wallets
    ADD CONSTRAINT wallets_user_id_key UNIQUE (user_id);


--
-- Name: idx_activity_user; Type: INDEX; Schema: public; Owner: -
--

CREATE INDEX idx_activity_user ON public.activity_logs USING btree (user_id);


--
-- Name: idx_btc_prices_fetched; Type: INDEX; Schema: public; Owner: -
--

CREATE INDEX idx_btc_prices_fetched ON public.btc_prices USING btree (fetched_at DESC);


--
-- Name: idx_notifications_user; Type: INDEX; Schema: public; Owner: -
--

CREATE INDEX idx_notifications_user ON public.notifications USING btree (user_id);


--
-- Name: idx_otp_email; Type: INDEX; Schema: public; Owner: -
--

CREATE INDEX idx_otp_email ON public.otp_codes USING btree (email);


--
-- Name: idx_sessions_refresh; Type: INDEX; Schema: public; Owner: -
--

CREATE INDEX idx_sessions_refresh ON public.sessions USING btree (refresh_token);


--
-- Name: idx_transactions_user; Type: INDEX; Schema: public; Owner: -
--

CREATE INDEX idx_transactions_user ON public.transactions USING btree (user_id);


--
-- Name: idx_txn_payment_hash; Type: INDEX; Schema: public; Owner: -
--

CREATE INDEX idx_txn_payment_hash ON public.transactions USING btree (lightning_payment_hash);


--
-- Name: idx_vaults_user; Type: INDEX; Schema: public; Owner: -
--

CREATE INDEX idx_vaults_user ON public.vaults USING btree (user_id);


--
-- Name: idx_wallets_user; Type: INDEX; Schema: public; Owner: -
--

CREATE INDEX idx_wallets_user ON public.wallets USING btree (user_id);


--
-- Name: activity_logs activity_logs_user_id_fkey; Type: FK CONSTRAINT; Schema: public; Owner: -
--

ALTER TABLE ONLY public.activity_logs
    ADD CONSTRAINT activity_logs_user_id_fkey FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES public.users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE;


--
-- Name: notifications notifications_user_id_fkey; Type: FK CONSTRAINT; Schema: public; Owner: -
--

ALTER TABLE ONLY public.notifications
    ADD CONSTRAINT notifications_user_id_fkey FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES public.users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE;


--
-- Name: price_protection price_protection_user_id_fkey; Type: FK CONSTRAINT; Schema: public; Owner: -
--

ALTER TABLE ONLY public.price_protection
    ADD CONSTRAINT price_protection_user_id_fkey FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES public.users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE;


--
-- Name: profiles profiles_user_id_fkey; Type: FK CONSTRAINT; Schema: public; Owner: -
--

ALTER TABLE ONLY public.profiles
    ADD CONSTRAINT profiles_user_id_fkey FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES public.users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE;


--
-- Name: sessions sessions_user_id_fkey; Type: FK CONSTRAINT; Schema: public; Owner: -
--

ALTER TABLE ONLY public.sessions
    ADD CONSTRAINT sessions_user_id_fkey FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES public.users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE;


--
-- Name: transactions transactions_user_id_fkey; Type: FK CONSTRAINT; Schema: public; Owner: -
--

ALTER TABLE ONLY public.transactions
    ADD CONSTRAINT transactions_user_id_fkey FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES public.users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE;


--
-- Name: transactions transactions_vault_id_fkey; Type: FK CONSTRAINT; Schema: public; Owner: -
--

ALTER TABLE ONLY public.transactions
    ADD CONSTRAINT transactions_vault_id_fkey FOREIGN KEY (vault_id) REFERENCES public.vaults(id) ON DELETE SET NULL;


--
-- Name: vaults vaults_user_id_fkey; Type: FK CONSTRAINT; Schema: public; Owner: -
--

ALTER TABLE ONLY public.vaults
    ADD CONSTRAINT vaults_user_id_fkey FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES public.users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE;


--
-- Name: wallets wallets_user_id_fkey; Type: FK CONSTRAINT; Schema: public; Owner: -
--

ALTER TABLE ONLY public.wallets
    ADD CONSTRAINT wallets_user_id_fkey FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES public.users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE;
